name: ECML14_NB-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to rail routes from Newcastle Central to Ashington via Benton North Junction, and the section from Bedlington to Morpeth.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2021 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / ECML14_NB SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89 to ECML14_NB-IRF (1) (code 9759) used in conjunction with the ECML14_NB-TM map projection (code 9760).
